name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, unusual utility usage causes unexpected costs. We automatically monitor utility bills instead of manual monitoring of utility bills.
problem_solved: unusual utility usage leading to unexpected costs
